title: Exline's Furniture
description: Furniture to decorate your world with! This mod adds many new blocks to decorate with, all craft-able in survival mode.
body:
# Exline's Furniture

Transform your Minecraft living spaces with Exline’s Furniture Mod, a perfect blend of comfort and creativity!

Tired of mundane interiors and lackluster outdoor spaces in your Minecraft world? Exline’s Furniture Mod offers a comprehensive solution to elevate your building and decorating experience. This mod introduces a wide array of meticulously designed furniture and decor items, bringing a touch of realism and elegance to both your indoor and outdoor environments.

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CQ7pGNKT/images/f11dfab58ab4df62c69cf721759136f3947a96ba.png)

## Key Features:

- Versatile Furniture: Select from an extensive collection of furniture pieces, including a variety of chairs in different wood types and vibrant wool colors, tables that suit any style, and decorative drapes that add sophistication to any room.
  
- Interactive Decor: Engage with your surroundings like never before. Sit in cushioned chairs, toggle lights and TVs, and use various kitchen appliances to make your virtual home feel alive.
  
- Outdoor Enhancements: Enhance your garden with beautiful bird baths made from bricks or stone, and relax in stylish Adirondack chairs perfect for enjoying the sunset.
  
- Seasonal Updates: Keep your world in tune with the seasons through thematic updates that introduce festive decorations and spooky elements for special occasions.
  
- Server Compatibility: Furnish your multiplayer server in style. This mod works seamlessly on servers, allowing you to share your beautifully decorated spaces with friends.

With Exline’s Furniture Mod, every block is a canvas for your creativity. Whether you're crafting a cozy cottage or a majestic castle, this mod adds depth, personality, and a unique charm to your Minecraft adventures.

Download Exline’s Furniture Mod now and start transforming your Minecraft world with style and functionality!

## Recipes
Recipes are available at [Exline Mods](https://exlinemods.com/recipes#f7162766-b7b1-4ca8-9bb6-39f51cee2e44)

![recipe for drapes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CQ7pGNKT/images/7a764909c88b723ce9ef3879ac9fe1f24f373c8e.gif)

## Compatibility:

Exline's Furniture is compatible with the following Minecraft versions for Fabric:
- [1.21](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-furniture/versions?l=fabric&g=1.21)
- [1.20 - 1.20.6](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-furniture/versions?l=fabric&g=1.20.6&g=1.20.5&g=1.20.4&g=1.20.2&g=1.20&g=1.20.1)
- [1.19 - 1.19.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-furniture/versions?l=fabric&g=1.19.4&g=1.19.3&g=1.19.2&g=1.19)
- [1.18.1 - 1.18.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-furniture/versions?l=fabric&g=1.18.2&g=1.18.1)
- [1.17.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-furniture/versions?l=fabric&g=1.17.1)
- [1.16.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-furniture/versions?l=fabric&g=1.16.5)

These versions for Forge:
- [1.20, 1.20.1, 1.20.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-furniture/versions?l=forge&g=1.20&g=1.20.1&g=1.20.4)
- [1.19.4, 1.19.3, 1.19.2, 1.19](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-furniture/versions?l=forge&g=1.19.4&g=1.19.3&g=1.19.2&g=1.19)
- [1.18.2, 1.18.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-furniture/versions?l=forge&g=1.18.1&g=1.18.2)
- [1.17.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-furniture/versions?l=forge&g=1.17.1)
- [1.16.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-furniture/versions?l=forge&g=1.16.5)

These versions for Quilt:
- [1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-furniture/versions?l=quilt&g=1.20.1)
- [1.20](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-furniture/versions?l=quilt&g=1.20)
- [1.19.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-furniture/versions?l=quilt&g=1.19.4)

# Explore More at ExlineMods!

Thank you for using our mods! For the best experience, visit our official website, [Exline Mods](https://exlinemods.com/).
Why Visit Our Website?

- Early Updates: Get the latest updates faster than other sites.
- Exclusive Tools: Download our mod setup program, also available on Nexus Mods.
- Crafting Recipes: Find detailed crafting recipes for our mods.
- Join the Community: Connect with fellow modders and get support via our Discord server.
- Direct Support and Feedback: Reach out directly for support and share feedback on Discord.

Get Started!

Visit [Exline Mods](https://exlinemods.com/) now and [join our Discord Server](https://discord.gg/9UVGJGyqbv) to be part of our community. We look forward to seeing you there!
